title: 伝説のお姫様『カワカミプリンセス』

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
"Do you know the princess named Kawakami
Princess?"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Kawakami. Let's do some partner runnin'
today!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I was supposed to be first! Don't you know
how to wait your turn?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, now—calm down, you two. How about we
all compete together in a scrimmage instead?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'll crush you both with my speed!

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
"As wild and unruly in life as she is on the track,
the glow of her heart shines strong..."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! So we meet once again, my dear friend
Sweep. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Don't talk like we're equals! I'm the star here, not you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What?! How could you say something so mean?!
The true star...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Is our friendship, wouldn't you say?

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
"She always shows her opponents respect, even as
she strives with all her might to overcome them."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, thank you so much for watching our
races!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: You were so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
Hey, keep talking like that, and she'll go soft!
Princess, I know you can become even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text: You're the one who keeps us going!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Thank you for both your kind and strict
words of encouragement. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But don't you worry. I'll never stop trying to get
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In order to continue being true to myself, and to
keep shining like a dazzling princess...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'll always blaze my own path.

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
"She is a princess who continually looks
ahead—her silhouette a source of inspiration for
the people."

text_block_list.name: Monitor
text_block_list.text: "The Legendary Princess: Kawakami Princess! Now on sale and available to rent!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
They put the film about me next to the Princess
Fighter shelf...

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
A lot of things have happened since that live
broadcast... But I'm relieved we were finally able
to release this film.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
I'm just sorry it's in the form of a documentary
instead of a cartoon. I know you love Princess
Fighter...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No, I'm truly grateful! I think this way...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It does a better job at conveying the message
that I envisioned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The request came to us just after we'd wrapped
up Kawakami Princess's third year.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...A special about me?

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
Yes. But it won't be broadcast on TV—we intend
to release it to the retail market.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
We're thinking of coordinating with both the
online content and film departments to make it
available to buy, rent, or even stream.
choice_data_list: This seems like a pretty major project...

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
Haha. It's rather paltry when you compare it to
the things Kawakami Princess is trying to teach
the next generation.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, she's trying to work alongside the
younger students to build a new era.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Mommy, I wanna rent this one!

text_block_list.name: Girl's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, this isn't a cartoon, you know. Those outfits
are really cute, but it's probably too complicated
for you. You'll fall asleep midway through it.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh! I can watch it!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: I mean, I'm a big girl now—huh?!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Kawakami... Princess?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hm? Yes, I'm Kawakami Princess...

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Really?! You're the real Kawakami Princess?!
Wow!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Um, I wannna grow up to be just like you one day!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: I want to be an amazing princess, too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and I'm sure you will be. You'll become your
own ideal princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And one day, you'll meet a prince of your own,
who believes in you and will walk that path
alongside you.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: A prince?! Is that... someone like my daddy?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, maybe so. Or maybe it's someone like your
mommy. Or maybe they're not even a person at
all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But as long as you always put in the effort to
achieve your dreams, I'm sure you'll get what you
wish for and meet wonderful people along the
way.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's what happened to me. Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
See?! So all you have to do is walk down the path
you believe in.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're only at the very beginning of your princess
path!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with those words, Kawakami Princess—or
rather, the ultimate princess—treats the young
girl to a truly radiant smile.
